channel.title: Frontion News Headlines
channel.description: Breaking geopolitical news from Tier 1 sources

item.title: 🏛️ US House votes to curb Trump's Iran war powers in rebuke
item.description: The House passed a war powers resolution with a 215-208 vote, with four Republicans joining Democrats. The measure aims to limit presidential military authority over Iran.

item.title: 🌏 South China Sea: Vietnam joins land reclamation race as tensions rise
item.description: After years of watching China build islands, Vietnam and other claimants are now dredging reefs in the disputed South China Sea, escalating territorial disputes.

item.title: 🇱🇧 Israel and Lebanon agree to implement ceasefire if Hezbollah stops attacks
item.description: The US-brokered agreement would see Israel halt its offensive if Hezbollah ceases fire. Both countries reject attempts to hold Lebanon hostage to regional conflicts.

item.title: 🇮🇷 One killed in Iranian drone strike on Kuwait airport as ceasefire tested
item.description: Iran attacked Kuwait international airport in retaliation for earlier US strikes, killing one and injuring dozens. The attack tests the fragile ceasefire agreement.

item.title: 🇴🇲 Oman resists US pressure to break ties with Iran over Hormuz
item.description: The Gulf state maintains its relationship with Tehran despite Washington's demands, highlighting the delicate balance regional powers face in the US-Iran conflict.

item.title: 🇯🇵 Japan faces plastic shortage as Iran war disrupts naphtha supply
item.description: The Middle East conflict is causing shortages of naphtha, a key petrochemical used in plastics manufacturing, affecting Japanese industry.

item.title: 🇨🇳 China's great power diplomacy: Does it now hinge on Beijing?
item.description: After Trump and Putin, China emerges as the third major power shaping global diplomacy, with questions about its role in international mediation.

item.title: 🇦🇫 Taliban and Russia cozy up as geopolitical alliances shift
item.description: Russia's engagement with the Taliban signals changing regional dynamics as Moscow seeks influence in South Asia amid Western withdrawal.

item.title: 🛢️ Saudi Arabia and Russia tighten grip on oil market as UAE exits OPEC
item.description: The UAE's departure from OPEC reshapes global oil markets as Saudi Arabia and Russia strengthen their energy alliance.

item.title: 🇳🇿 China bans four New Zealand MPs over Taiwan visit
item.description: Beijing imposed one-year bans on New Zealand lawmakers who visited Taiwan, escalating diplomatic tensions between the two countries.

item.title: 🇩🇪 Germany blames Russia for 'bitter defeat' in UN Security Council bid
item.description: Germany failed to secure a UN Security Council seat, with officials accusing Russia of campaigning against Berlin over its support for Ukraine.

item.title: 🇨🇳 US allies warn China using job platforms to target security personnel
item.description: Intelligence agencies from multiple US allies are warning about Chinese espionage efforts targeting security personnel through fake job recruitment.

item.title: 🇮🇱 Trump confirms calling Netanyahu 'crazy' as Israel complicates Iran talks
item.description: The US president acknowledged the strained relationship with Israel's prime minister as ceasefire negotiations with Iran continue.

item.title: 🇸🇴 Gunfire in Mogadishu as Somalia protests against president
item.description: Heavy gunfire erupted in Somalia's capital before planned anti-government protests, with former PM accusing security forces of attacking him.

item.title: 🇺🇦 Greece protests Ukraine naval drone incident
item.description: Greece issued a formal diplomatic protest over a Ukrainian naval drone incident that affected Greek waters.

item.title: 🇺🇸 US House advances Ukraine aid bill toward final vote
item.description: The House of Representatives moved forward with legislation to provide additional military assistance to Ukraine.

item.title: 🇭🇺 Hungary could host Ukraine-Russia peace talks
item.description: Hungarian officials suggested Budapest could serve as a neutral venue for potential peace negotiations between Ukraine and Russia.

item.title: 🇺🇦 NATO chief arrives in Kyiv after mass Russian strike
item.description: NATO's secretary general visited Ukraine's capital one day after a major Russian missile and drone attack.

item.title: 🇬🇧 Former MI6 chief Alex Younger dies at 62
item.description: Alex Younger, who led Britain's foreign intelligence service from 2014 to 2020, has passed away.

item.title: 🇧🇩 Bangladesh Rahman elected UN General Assembly president in tight race
item.description: Bangladesh's candidate won the presidency of the UN General Assembly after a close vote.

item.title: 🇨🇳 New Chinese submarine with unique feature spotted by satellite
item.description: Satellite imagery revealed a new large Chinese submarine design with unusual characteristics, raising questions about Beijing's naval capabilities.

item.title: 🇷🇺 Ukrainian drones strike St. Petersburg oil terminal before economic forum
item.description: Ukrainian long-range drones attacked oil storage facilities near St. Petersburg as Russia prepared to host its flagship economic forum.

item.title: 🇮🇷 Kuwait: Iranian drones kill one at airport as ceasefire tested
item.description: Iran's drone attack on Kuwait International Airport killed one person and injured dozens more, testing the fragile ceasefire agreement.

item.title: 🇮🇱 Israeli attacks kill nine in Lebanon, reach Beirut outskirts
item.description: Israeli strikes killed nine people in Lebanon and reached the outskirts of Beirut, testing the US-mediated ceasefire agreement.

item.title: 🇧🇷 Lula says Brazil cannot accept 'treatment' after new US tariffs proposed
item.description: Brazil's president expressed surprise at the proposed 25% tariffs, which came amid signs of improving relations between the two countries.
